display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team is left stumped when the owner of a hair salon is killed in front of her family, but no one saw what happened.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. When an elderly resident at a retirement home appears to have taken his own life, Humphrey is not convinced.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: A missing manuscript case takes a dramatic turn when Frank and Lu find themselves trapped in a famous author's house, where no one is what they seem.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank and Lu investigate a suspicious death among a team of actors who offer Shakespeare for hire for any occasion.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the disappearances of Nikola Tesla and Marie Curie from a conference of 20th-century innovators.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a body is found during a fox hunt, Murdoch and Brackenreid suspect a group opposed to the blood sport is responsible.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A trail of incriminating evidence in the grisly murder of his unpleasant neighbour leads directly to Murdoch.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Incredible Astonishing Adventures of Constable George Crabtree: After a prison break and a bank heist, Murdoch and Crabtree contend with reports of a mechanical man with a cannon arm.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a lawyer's murder is staged to appear like a dog attack, Murdoch suspects the culprits were after a dog who was bequeathed a fortune.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Two Deaths of Hercule Flambeau: Following reports of Flambeau's death, the clerical sleuth races to protect a crown that contains a nail from the crucifixion of Christ.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents investigate the death of a man who was convicted of murder and rape, but released from jail because of faulty DNA evidence.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex is on trial after his DNA is discovered at the scene of the murder of Donovan's former police informant.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A shooting melee leaves a promising young college student dead and shows a police gang specialist in a harsh light.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall stars as the detective at work on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. The team are tested when a millionaire philanthropist is murdered on his boat.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The Incredible Astonishing Adventures of Constable George Crabtree: After a prison break and a bank heist, Murdoch and Crabtree contend with reports of a mechanical man with a cannon arm.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a lawyer's murder is staged to appear like a dog attack, Murdoch suspects the culprits were after a dog who was bequeathed a fortune.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents investigate the death of a man who was convicted of murder and rape, but released from jail because of faulty DNA evidence.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: Rex is on trial after his DNA is discovered at the scene of the murder of Donovan's former police informant.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Two Deaths of Hercule Flambeau: Following reports of Flambeau's death, the clerical sleuth races to protect a crown that contains a nail from the crucifixion of Christ.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Crime drama series. A shooting melee leaves a promising young college student dead and shows a police gang specialist in a harsh light.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall stars as the detective at work on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. The team are tested when a millionaire philanthropist is murdered on his boat.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Kris Marshall is the detective on a sun-drenched Caribbean island. When an elderly resident at a retirement home appears to have taken his own life, Humphrey is not convinced.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The clerical sleuth must delve into the past and open up old wounds when a child killer is found murdered.
Documentary about the incredible story of one of football's most dramatic triumphs - when Arsenal snatched the Championship title from Liverpool at Anfield in the last minute of the 1988-89 seaso.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: More grumpy fun with hapless OAP Victor Meldrew. A trip to Whipsnade Zoo turns into a nightmare when Victor and Margaret become imprisoned like the animals.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Beware the Trickster on the Roof: Victor and Margaret battle to rid their home of an evil Moroccan curse, as their neighbours put their house up for sale - but there are few takers.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: The superb, slightly surreal sitcom. Victor and Margaret visit the BBC with a virtually unconscious window cleaner they believe to be Mrs Warboys' cousin.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Some Day We'll Laugh about This: Brilliant 1970s sitcom. Bob and Thelma go away to Scotland for the weekend, leaving Terry in charge of their new home. Will Bob never learn.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish comedy series from the creators of Porridge. After hurting his foot, Bob visits the hospital - where Terry now works as a porter.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Sitcom sequel that surpasses the original. Bob takes time away from Thelma to join Terry on a fishing trip. He's racked by guilt, but is not the guilty one.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: James May's Cars of the People
programme.desc: It's back to the future for James May - he asks what happened to the cutting-edge motors our forebears promised, including fanciful steam cars and ludicrous jet turbines.

programme.title: Make It At Market
programme.desc: Dominic Chinea helps willow-crafter Cath and furniture maker Morgan turn their crafty hobbies into money-making businesses.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: A Cold War Soviet classic goes under the hammer. Built like a tank, the Moskvitch gets few admirers for style, but finds a home with a fan of Eastern Bloc classics.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek collects a Mark 2 Jag and explains why they made such poor getaway cars for bank robbers. A customer considers a Morris Marina as a present for his wife.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Charting the evolution of Auschwitz. This episode looks at the development of the 'Final Solution'.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Dramatised documentary examining how Adolf Hitler and the Nazi party seized power in Germany during the 1930s and led to the destruction of democracy in the country.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a second programme from the Spa Royal Hall in Bridlington, East Yorkshire. Items include a set of buttons commemorating the Battle of Quebec.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team visit Oxburgh Hall in Norfolk, where they assess finds including a 300-year-old treasure box and a set of discarded postcards.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire for a 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport styled by Milan coachbuilder Zagato.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution
programme.desc: Charting the evolution of Auschwitz. This episode looks at the development of the 'Final Solution'.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: Dramatised documentary examining how Adolf Hitler and the Nazi party seized power in Germany during the 1930s and led to the destruction of democracy in the country.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents a second programme from the Spa Royal Hall in Bridlington, East Yorkshire. Items include a set of buttons commemorating the Battle of Quebec.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie begins a new canal adventure in Wales and encounters towering aqueducts and stunning scenery along the way.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie's journey on the Llangollen Canal takes an unexpected turn when his boat gets stuck in silt and a passing hire boat comes to the rescue.

programme.title: Operation Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Relive one of the Wild West's great adventures of discovery as historian Dan Snow and his team take on the rapids of the Grand Canyon in antique wooden boats.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire for a 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport styled by Milan coachbuilder Zagato.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will set out to buy a Honda-based Rover 800 coupe. At only 650 pounds it seems too good to be true - and when they turn up, they aren't sure whether to proceed.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien attempt to restore items including an old cheese press, and a 1980s motorbike almost gets the better of Henry and his restorer Guy.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Abigail’s night out takes an unexpected turn. Cash is stuck with Richie the rookie. Can Roo and Alf get on the same page?

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Each week, five very different groups of ordinary Aussies become travel critics as they head on the same week-long holiday. This week’s destination - a European cruise!

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Kent Brockman accidentally utters an obscenity during a news broadcast, leading to a heavy fine from the FCC - and costing Brockman his job. S18 E22

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon gets upset about his career, the destruction of the comic book store and Leonard and Penny's future living arrangements. S7 E24

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's trip ends when he is robbed, and Howard is weirded out by his mother's relationship with Stuart. S8 E1

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie and Levi bet on their baby’s gender. Alf feels persecuted. Richie oversteps.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Izzy's legacy looms.

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: Frank’s rhythm is put to the test in a charity challenge. And the window to play advantage cards is closing fast.

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: A troubling incident at a school draws the team into a complex case; Celina's temporary missing persons assignment leads her into a dangerous situation. S8 E14

programme.title: The Hunting Party
programme.desc: Two decades after his apparent death, cult leader and serial killer Noah Cyrus appears on the doorstep of one of his followers; against the clock, the team races to stop Cyrus' plans. S2 E5

programme.title: Celebrity Treasure Island
programme.desc: Frank’s rhythm is put to the test in a charity challenge. And the window to play advantage cards is closing fast.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder at a vampire and werewolf convention in Las Vegas. S11 E3

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, Or Murder
programme.desc: Explore the unbelievable true stories of suspicious deaths, unpacking the evidence and strange behaviour that led investigators to question these tragic events.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Women On The Verge
programme.desc: Laura bumps into her first love and thinks he might want to rekindle their relationship when he asks her out for a drink. S1 e4

programme.title: Farmer Wants A Wife
programme.desc: The farmers meet two new ladies and choose one for a romantic date. Then at the Country Fair, the new arrivals rock romantic foundations, triggering an ultimatum.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Are you ready to kanikani? Join Tama, Māia, JoJo and guests including Aunty Anika (Anika Moa) as they dance, sing and have fun around their whare in this fun and educational new series!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters Of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai, Jay, Cole and Zane must master their elemental powers and Spinjitzu weapons to protect the land of Ninjago, which also has an underworld.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Join Peppa and her animal friends on fun-filled adventures - playing games, dressing up and of course jumping in muddy puddles!

programme.title: Takaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Farm To Fork
programme.desc: Farm to Fork takes you on a journey across Australia, showcasing fresh local produce to inspire healthy cooking. Discover where your food comes from, support local farmers, and learn how to eat well.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Izzy's legacy looms.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie and Levi bet on their baby’s gender. Alf feels persecuted. Richie oversteps.

programme.title: Agatha Christie: Lucy Worsley on the Mystery Queen
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley examines Agatha's mysterious disappearance in December 1926 and reveals the influence this episode had on her writing.

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: Discover the vast array of unusual creatures that call southern Chile and Argentina home. We enter the weird world of maras, desert-dwelling penguins and guanacos.

programme.title: Patagonia: Earth's Secret Paradise
programme.desc: Discover Patagonia's awe-inspiring coastline, which is some 4,000 miles long. Penguins brave the waters of Cape Horn, while orcas target seal pups in the desert.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley explains our macabre fixation with killing. Hear how real-life crimes in the early 1800s gave society a thirst for murder.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Lucy Worsley dissects society's dark obsession with slayings. Hear how science and detection affected the culture of homicide in the Victorian Age.

programme.title: A Very British Murder with Lucy Worsley
programme.desc: Learn about the boom in detective fiction during the interwar era, a time of Agatha Christie and Alfred Hitchcock. Lucy Worsley's chronology of killing climaxes.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru take a boat ride in the Argentine jungle with gin and tonic with some remote Anglo-Argentines, hummingbirds, honey and a spot of tango.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru navigate the Lancaster Canal, an early masterpiece of the waterways, as they travel along the coast of Morecambe Bay and visit Carnforth and Lune Aqueduct.

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Tim and Pru embark on an epic journey along Canada's Rideau Canal - a World Heritage Site - from the backwoods of Ontario to the nation's capital of Ottawa.

programme.title: River Walks
programme.desc: Blind adventurer Amar Latif takes us along one of Yorkshire's most stunning river valleys as he abseils into a hidden gorge and meets some local llamas.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A legendary diesel locomotive, that's undergone over half a million pounds worth of repairs must be hauled over 40 miles ready for a diesel gala.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The Train Truckers are on the clock this week as they attempt to move a 100-ton diesel engine to a gala extravaganza, as well as a 175-ton rail crane destined for Egypt.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Jake hauls 250,000 dollars' worth of cattle, Des must deliver a massive 101 tonnes of railway ballast to Queensland, and Glenn races against time to deliver 70 tonnes of salt lick.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Jack and Hollywood work to deliver 500,000 dollars' worth of cattle, Dave is booked to collect a 75,000-dollar ute, and trucker Jorden has broken down and desperately needs help.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: A legendary diesel locomotive, that's undergone over half a million pounds worth of repairs must be hauled over 40 miles ready for a diesel gala.

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: The Train Truckers are on the clock this week as they attempt to move a 100-ton diesel engine to a gala extravaganza, as well as a 175-ton rail crane destined for Egypt.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Jake hauls 250,000 dollars' worth of cattle, Des must deliver a massive 101 tonnes of railway ballast to Queensland, and Glenn races against time to deliver 70 tonnes of salt lick.

programme.title: Aussie Road Train Truckers
programme.desc: Jack and Hollywood work to deliver 500,000 dollars' worth of cattle, Dave is booked to collect a 75,000-dollar ute, and trucker Jorden has broken down and desperately needs help.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Featuring the Mastermind sketch, join the dearly missed duo for more first-class comedy. Allotment, Broadway Malady and the ongoing spoof serial The Worm That Turned also feature.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Comedy and variety show with the bespectacled Barker and Corbett. Featuring the sketches Small Parts, Allotment, Nobody's Parrot, Yoiks Tally Ho!, and The Worm That Turned.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage laughs from the bespectacled comedy greats. Other humorous highlights include: Minister of Poetry, The Bank and Doctor's Orders.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: More witty wordplay and perfect parody with Barker, Corbett, and guest Diana Dors. Sketches include: Gummidges Greetings Cards, A Further Diet of Worms, and The Worm That Turned.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Featuring the Confusing Shopping List sketch. More chucklesome skits courtesy of the bespectacled Rons, including Minister of Intelligence, Welcome Home and Rochdale Ringers.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Featuring the Mastermind sketch, join the dearly missed duo for more first-class comedy. Allotment, Broadway Malady and the ongoing spoof serial The Worm That Turned also feature.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Comedy and variety show with the bespectacled Barker and Corbett. Featuring the sketches Small Parts, Allotment, Nobody's Parrot, Yoiks Tally Ho!, and The Worm That Turned.

programme.title: The Two Ronnies
programme.desc: Vintage laughs from the bespectacled comedy greats. Other humorous highlights include: Minister of Poetry, The Bank and Doctor's Orders.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Kevin faces up to failure and gets help from unlikely quarters, as Leo tries to be a better man for love. S4 E4

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Greek Job
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan’s creative juices are flowing as they go all out with the master bedroom, designing an Aphrodite-themed suite for parents to reconnect on holiday.

programme.title: Can You Keep A Secret?
programme.desc: Season Finale: As Debbie considers coming clean, the blackmailer decides enough is enough. But this endgame puts Harry and William in genuine danger – is it all over for the Fendons? S1 E6

programme.title: The Secret Genius Of Modern Life
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Hannah takes a look at the air fryer – a device that is rapidly taking over people's kitchens, cooking up everything from bread rolls to baked Alaska and almost making ovens obsolet

programme.title: Twenty Twenty Six
programme.desc: Season Finale: A boycott and politics threaten the Opening Ceremony after a visit from its Creative Director. Meanwhile it’s time for Ian to think about life after football. S1 E6

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob, David and Lee are joined by Amanda Abbington, Phill Jupitus, Greg Davies, Gareth Malone and Richard Osman.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Izzy's legacy looms.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: A terrified patient with a failing heart has Aaron and Laura on high alert. Chris and Sam meet their oldest ever patient. 104-year-old Nelly has face injuries after a fall.

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa with WWF
programme.desc: Pax and Nicola travel to the magical island of Te Hauturu-o-Toi a.k.a Little Barrier Island to search for endangered species in a real-life Jurassic Park. S1 E3

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.
